name: Kevin Coalwell
bio: Versatile designer specializing in translating complex technical concepts into compelling visual experiences through strategic brand design and content creation, with proven experience engaging large-scale digital audiences. A unique blend of hands-on technical ability and attentive design sensibilities enable me to bridge the gap between engineering teams and broader markets.

experience.title: Brand Designer
highlights: Managing internal coordination of comprehensive visual rebrand, serving as creative liaison between stakeholders and design contractors.
Led visual strategy for website redesign project, focusing on user experience optimization and brand consistency.
Developed comprehensive visual strategy for major trade show presence, designing booth graphics and collatoral that supported lead generation goals

experience.title: Creative Producer
highlights: Cultivated the company brand, voice, and storytelling strategy, built trust and generated millions of engagements across digital channels.
Interviewed SMEs to translate highly technical topics into engaging content across a variety of touch points.
Managed creative contractors and sourced freelance labor.

experience.title: Creative Content Manager
highlights: Produced and published multimedia content across social channels to an audience of over 50,000.
Developed visual brand strategy for multimedia content in adherance to existing brand guidelines.
Interfaced with engineering teams to communicate software updates, new features, and tutorials to core audience.

experience.title: Video Producer
highlights: Coordinated with clients, drafted project proposals, conducted video shoots, and edited documentary and promotional content for Oregon State University in accordance with university brand guidelines.

education.degree: Bachelor of Fine Arts, Digital Communication Arts

awards.title: Official Selection, Sweet Home Film Festival
